creator: teksimian@gmail.com
text:
After booting Windows 10 guest, bhyve logs "atkbd data buffer full" to console and no key strokes are received by the guest.

11.0-Release.

Behaviour present in bhyve in base of 11.0-Release, as well as the most recent SVN revision checked out bhyve 307779.


only reference found: http://freebsd.1045724.x6.nabble.com/bhyve-graphics-support-td6101646.html

behaviour also persistent between Host reboots.
